body.title: pe: Define PROC_CODE_A_TICKET basket contract
body.result: Seeded tpl-layer4-code-a-ticket-basket to DB — basket contract, node sequence, llm_calls/pure_tool_nodes, basket sharing semantics (T-basket-fork-sharing). All pe-* nodes reference this.
body.description: Formal basket contract for the coding sprint engram: ticket_id, ticket_description, plan_files, line_range, actual, hypothesis (structured edit), test_result, attempt_count. Seed as a schema node / docstring. All subsequent pe-* nodes reference this contract.
